case_title: MORALES, YOLANDA et al VS HUJAZI, MONICA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES, YOLANDA ESCOBAR, CAROLINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUJAZI, MONICA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HUJAZI, MONICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MORALES, YOLANDA ESCOBAR, CAROLINA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
